proWaitlistIssueBodyTemplate.message:
## Privacy Notice
- Please do NOT paste any webpage content or copied content.
- Please do NOT paste any personal data.

## Pro scope (Free vs Planned)
- Existing free core features will remain free (no paywall).
- Pro is optional, planned enhancements (not shipped yet).
- Doc: https://github.com/ayqy/copy/blob/main/docs/monetization/pro-scope.md

## Environment
- Extension Version: $EXT_VERSION$
- Extension ID: $EXT_ID$
- navigator.language: $NAV_LANG$
- UI Language: $UI_LANG$$CAMPAIGN_LINE$

## Use case
-

## Desired Pro capabilities
-

## Contact (optional)
-

proWaitlistSurveyBodyTemplate.message:
## Privacy Notice
- No webpage content / copied content / URL / title is included.
- Everything comes from extension environment info + what you manually type.
- Contact info is optional and voluntary. The extension will not auto-collect/auto-fill/auto-send it.

## Environment
- Extension Version: $EXT_VERSION$
- Extension ID: $EXT_ID$
- navigator.language: $NAV_LANG$
- UI Language: $UI_LANG$$CAMPAIGN_LINE$

## Payment Interest Survey (Optional)

### Use case
$USE_CASE$

### Desired Pro capabilities (aligned with pro-scope)
$PRO_CAPABILITIES$

### Payment intent
- Willing to pay: $PAY_WILLING$
- Acceptable price (monthly): $PAY_MONTHLY$
- Acceptable price (annual): $PAY_ANNUAL$

### Contact (optional)
$CONTACT$

# Copylot Distribution Pack (Auditable)

- campaign: $CAMPAIGN$

## 1) Official Site URL (UTM + campaign)
$OFFICIAL_SITE_URL$

## 2) Chrome Web Store URL (UTM + campaign)
$STORE_URL$

## 3) Pro Waitlist URL (UTM + campaign)
$WAITLIST_URL$

## 4) Recruit Copy (ready to share)

```text
$RECRUIT_COPY$
```

## 5) Optional: Survey Guide
- If you'd like to help us shape Pro: after installing, open Copylot -> Options -> Pro, click "Copy survey (with env info)" and send it to us (no webpage or private content needed).

---

Privacy: This pack contains no webpage content, copied content, current page URL, or title. Only fixed template + campaign + official/store/waitlist links.

proWeeklyChannelOpsEvidencePackVerifyMar.message:
# Weekly channel ops evidence pack verification notes (v1-63)

This evidence pack is for local audit/verification only: no URLs, titles, page content, or copied text. No network uploads.

## Metric definitions (aligned with v1-61/v1-57/v1-51)
- leads = pro_waitlist_copied + pro_waitlist_survey_copied (last 7 days, aggregated by campaign)
- distCopies = pro_distribution_asset_copied (last 7 days, aggregated by campaign)
- leadsPerDistCopy = leads / distCopies (distCopies=0 -> N/A; fixed 4 decimals)

## Verification steps (minimal)
1. Parse JSON and confirm `env.windowFrom/windowTo/lookbackDays`.
2. Recompute each row `leadsPerDistCopy`:
   - distCopies=0 => N/A
   - otherwise => (leads/distCopies).toFixed(4)
3. Verify distCopies counts:
   - parse `assets.proDistributionByCampaign7dCsv` and sum the distCopies column
   - matches the sum of distCopies in `assets.acquisitionEfficiencyEvidencePack.rows`
4. Verify leads counts:
   - parse `assets.proIntentEvents7dCsv` and count rows where eventName is pro_waitlist_copied / pro_waitlist_survey_copied
   - matches the sum of leads in `assets.acquisitionEfficiencyEvidencePack.rows`
5. (Optional) Verify `assets.acquisitionEfficiencyEvidencePack.csv` / `weeklyReportMarkdown` table matches rows.
proWeeklyChannelOpsEvidencePackVerifyMar.description: Embedded verification markdown inside the weekly channel ops evidence pack (for JSON audit)
